name: wanxiangshu-next
description: Wanxiangshu.Next Structured Flow runtime compiled via Fable

scripts.build: node -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; fs.rmSync('../build/next', {recursive: true, force: true});" && dotnet fable precompile Wanxiangshu.Next.fsproj -o ../build/next --noCache
scripts.test:compile: node -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; fs.rmSync('../build/tests-next', {recursive: true, force: true});" && cd ../tests-next && dotnet fable Wanxiangshu.Next.Tests.fsproj --outDir ../build/tests-next --precompiledLib ../build/next --noCache
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:compile && node ../tests-next/runner.js
